items.title: Telegram app restricted in India at NTA request until June 21
items.summary: The agency said that several Telegram groups were advertising fake exam papers for the upcoming NEET exam and defrauding candidates willing to pay for them
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Qobuz Is the Anti-Spotify Music Streamer You’ve Been Waiting For
items.summary: With its music focus, no-AI content policy, and larger artist royalties, the hi-res streaming service is scooping up all sorts of switchers.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Adobe Unveils New Creative Cloud Features for Photoshop, Premiere, After Effects and Lightroom
